pid_network_exposure/v1: shared-edge compatibility makes cellwise bounds nonsharp

structure_flags.label: Introduction
structure_flags.one_line: Section 4 has five required subparagraphs but lacks a distinct 'how research benefits from the conclusion' subparagraph.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship comparator citations to HuLiWager2022, SchroderOprescuFeuerriegelKallus2026, and BeresteanuMolchanovMolinari2011 are by bibkey only, with no section, equation, page, or quoted gap anchor.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses close network-uncertainty comparators Egami2020 and WeinsteinNevo2026, both directly about unobserved or misspecified interference networks.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The componentwise-interval failure does not name a specific published estimator or workflow that actually reports the refuted product-style direct/indirect rectangle.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The five-unit open-neighborhood witness gives edges and qualitative endpoint requirements but no concrete observable law P* or numerical cell means.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the current kernel is a routine finite compatibility-set extension unless tied to a location-anchored published frontier or open problem.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Section 6 defines Theta_K(P;t) and R_K(P;t) using the same completion class, matching equations, and total constraint, so the advertised sharpness equality is effectively built into the definitions.

soundness_flags.label: Known exposure-map corner
soundness_flags.one_line: The stated theta_D/theta_I definitions are finite two-policy/control-status contrasts and do not reduce to the Hu-Li-Wager infinitesimal Bernoulli decomposition without redefining t and the components.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The proof sketch invokes a random-set selection argument but does not identify the residual mathematical obstacle after the shared (G,m) completion is already included in R_K(P;t).

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Choose one total-effect convention: either rewrite theta_D and theta_I as Hu-Li-Wager infinitesimal derivatives at a common p, or drop the Hu-Li-Wager reduction and define t as the finite contrast actually decomposed.

Replace the definitional sharpness conjecture with a non-definitional frontier, such as a strict support-function tightening over Schroder et al.'s fixed canonical bounds or Weinstein-Nevo candidate-network robustness, with section/equation anchors.
Instantiate the five-unit witness with explicit p0, p1, observed mu_iar values, networks, exposure labels, and endpoint LP values.
Add the missing sixth Introduction subparagraph and add location-level anchors for each flagship comparator.

recommended_next_step: Do not send this to Stage 0; pivot or major-redraft around a non-definitional comparator-anchored frontier with a concrete witness.
